hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git push|deploy|kubectl apply|helm upgrade"; then echo "HARNESS: push/publish requires human approval (public repo — a push IS a release)" >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "^rm |^rmdir |git clean"; then echo "HARNESS: file deletion requires human approval" >&2; exit 2; fi'
